problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Combining Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
